tEn: Adafactor: Adaptive Learning Rates with Sublinear Memory Cost
tZh: Adafactor: 具有次线性内存成本的自适应学习率
sEn: Adafactor reduces memory usage in adaptive optimizers by factorizing second-moment estimates, achieving comparable results to Adam with minimal storage.
sZh: Adafactor通过分解二阶矩估计来减少自适应优化器的内存使用，在极小存储下达到与Adam相当的效果。
absEn: In several recently proposed stochastic optimization methods (e.g. RMSProp, Adam, Adadelta), parameter updates are scaled by the inverse square roots of exponential moving averages of squared past gradients. Maintaining these per-parameter second-moment estimators requires memory equal to the number of parameters. For the case of neural network weight matrices, we propose maintaining only the per-row and per-column sums of these moving averages, and estimating the per-parameter second moments based on these sums. We demonstrate empirically that this method produces similar results to the baseline. Secondly, we show that adaptive methods can produce larger-than-desired updates when the decay rate of the second moment accumulator is too slow. We propose update clipping and a gradually increasing decay rate scheme as remedies. Combining these methods and dropping momentum, we achieve comparable results to the published Adam regime in training the Transformer model on the WMT 2014 English-German machine translation task, while using very little auxiliary storage in the optimizer. Finally, we propose scaling the parameter updates based on the scale of the parameters themselves.
absZh: 在最近提出的几种随机优化方法（如RMSProp、Adam、Adadelta）中，参数更新通过缩放过去梯度平方的指数移动平均的平方根倒数来实现。维护这些逐参数二阶矩估计需要与参数数量相等的内存。对于神经网络权重矩阵的情况，我们提出仅维护这些移动平均的行和与列和，并基于这些和估计逐参数二阶矩。我们通过实验证明，该方法产生与基线相似的结果。其次，我们表明当二阶矩累积器的衰减率过慢时，自适应方法可能产生过大的更新。我们提出更新裁剪和逐渐增加衰减率的方案作为补救措施。结合这些方法并去除动量，我们在训练WMT 2014英德机器翻译任务的Transformer模型时，取得了与已发表的Adam方案相当的结果，同时优化器使用的辅助存储非常少。最后，我们提出根据参数本身的尺度来缩放参数更新。

contrib.en: Proposes Adafactor, a memory-efficient adaptive optimizer using factored second-moment estimation.
contrib.zh: 提出Adafactor，一种通过分解二阶矩估计实现内存高效的适应性优化器。

contrib.en: Reduces memory from O(nm) to O(n+m) for matrix parameters by storing row and column sums.
contrib.zh: 通过存储行和列的和，将矩阵参数的内存从O(nm)降低到O(n+m)。

contrib.en: Identifies instability from slow second-moment decay and proposes update clipping.
contrib.zh: 识别出二阶矩衰减过慢导致的不稳定性，并提出更新裁剪作为补救。

contrib.en: Introduces gradually increasing decay rate schedule to stabilize training without warmup.
contrib.zh: 引入逐渐增加的衰减率调度，无需预热即可稳定训练。

contrib.en: Proposes relative step size scaling based on parameter scale for robustness.
contrib.zh: 提出基于参数尺度的相对步长缩放，增强鲁棒性。

contrib.en: Achieves comparable BLEU to Adam on WMT14 En-De translation with sublinear memory.
contrib.zh: 在WMT14英德翻译任务上达到与Adam相当的BLEU分数，且内存为次线性。

limits.en: Empirical validation limited to Transformer on machine translation; generalizability unproven.
limits.zh: 实证验证仅限于机器翻译中的Transformer模型，泛化性未证实。

limits.en: Rank-1 factorization may lose information for matrices with complex gradient structure.
limits.zh: 秩1分解可能丢失具有复杂梯度结构的矩阵的信息。

limits.en: Update clipping threshold d requires tuning; fixed value may not suit all tasks.
limits.zh: 更新裁剪阈值d需要调参，固定值可能不适用于所有任务。

limits.en: Relative step size assumes parameter scale is meaningful; may fail for zero-initialized parameters.
limits.zh: 相对步长假设参数尺度有意义，可能对零初始化参数失效。

limits.en: Theoretical convergence guarantees not provided for non-convex settings.
limits.zh: 未提供非凸设置下的理论收敛保证。

items.en: In several recently proposed stochastic optimization methods (e.g. RMSProp, Adam, Adadelta), parameter updates are scaled by the inverse square roots of exponential moving averages of squared past gradients. Maintaining these per-parameter second-moment estimators requires memory equal to the number of parameters. For the case of neural network weight matrices, we propose maintaining only the per-row and per-column sums of these moving averages, and estimating the per-parameter second moments based on these sums. We demonstrate empirically that this method produces similar results to the baseline. Secondly, we show that adaptive methods can produce larger-than-desired updates when the decay rate of the second moment accumulator is too slow. We propose update clipping and a gradually increasing decay rate scheme as remedies. Combining these methods and dropping momentum, we achieve comparable results to the published Adam regime in training the Transformer model on the WMT 2014 English-German machine translation task, while using very little auxiliary storage in the optimizer. Finally, we propose scaling the parameter updates based on the scale of the parameters themselves.
items.zh: 在最近提出的几种随机优化方法（如 RMSProp、Adam、Adadelta）中，参数更新通过缩放过去梯度平方的指数移动平均的逆平方根来实现。维护这些逐参数二阶矩估计需要与参数数量相等的内存。对于神经网络权重矩阵的情况，我们提出仅维护这些移动平均的行和与列和，并基于这些和估计逐参数二阶矩。我们通过实验证明，该方法产生的结果与基线相似。其次，我们展示了当二阶矩累积器的衰减率过慢时，自适应方法可能产生比预期更大的更新。我们提出更新裁剪和逐渐增加衰减率的方案作为补救措施。结合这些方法并去掉动量，我们在训练 Transformer 模型进行 WMT 2014 英德机器翻译任务时，取得了与已发表的 Adam 方案相当的结果，同时优化器中使用的辅助存储非常少。最后，我们提出根据参数本身的尺度来缩放参数更新。

items.en: Gradient-based optimization forms the backbone of most modern approaches used to train deep neural networks. One of the simplest methods is stochastic gradient descent (SGD), wherein steps are taken along the direction of the negative gradient of the loss function evaluated on a minibatch. Building on this foundation, a variety of adaptive gradient-based methods have been proposed in which the gradient is divided by the componentwise square root of a vector summarizing the history of squared gradients, usually obtained through summation as in Adagrad (Duchi et al., 2011) or exponential averaging as in RMSProp (Tieleman & Hinton, 2012), Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015), and Adadelta (Zeiler, 2012). On convex problems, several of these methods offer theoretical advantages over SGD when gradients are sparse. While convergence guarantees have not yet been provided in the dense, non-convex setting in which most neural network training takes place, practitioners have nevertheless found these methods to empirically outperform SGD across a variety of domains.
items.zh: 基于梯度的优化构成了大多数现代深度神经网络训练方法的基础。最简单的方法之一是随机梯度下降（SGD），其中沿着在 minibatch 上评估的损失函数负梯度方向进行步进。在此基础上，提出了多种自适应梯度方法，其中梯度除以一个总结平方梯度历史的向量的逐分量平方根，通常通过求和（如 Adagrad, Duchi et al., 2011）或指数平均（如 RMSProp, Tieleman & Hinton, 2012; Adam, Kingma & Ba, 2015; Adadelta, Zeiler, 2012）获得。在凸问题上，当梯度稀疏时，其中几种方法在理论上优于 SGD。虽然在大多数神经网络训练所处的稠密非凸环境中尚未提供收敛保证，但实践者发现这些方法在多个领域经验性地优于 SGD。

items.en: The superior performance of these methods does come at a cost. Recent improvements in the computational capacity needed to train neural networks with larger numbers of parameters have far outstripped improvements in the memory capacity required to store those parameters during training. This has led to memory usage becoming an important constraint on model size. Adaptive optimization algorithms exacerbate this problem by requiring additional memory for extra accumulators, such as those required for momentum and per-coordinate gradient scaling. For example, Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015) keeps two additional values for each parameter, tripling the memory requirements.
items.zh: 这些方法的优越性能确实带来了代价。近年来，训练更大参数数量神经网络所需的计算能力的提升远远超过了训练期间存储这些参数所需的内存容量的提升。这导致内存使用成为模型大小的重要约束。自适应优化算法通过需要额外的内存用于额外的累积器（如动量和逐坐标梯度缩放所需的累积器）而加剧了这一问题。例如，Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015) 为每个参数保留两个额外值，使内存需求增加三倍。

items.en: We propose a way to reduce memory usage while retaining the empirical benefits of adaptivity by maintaining a factored representation of the squared gradient accumulator across training steps. Specifically, by tracking moving averages of the row and column sums of the squared gradients for matrix-valued variables, we are able to reconstruct a low-rank approximation of the exponentially smoothed accumulator at each training step that is optimal with respect to the generalized Kullback-Leibler divergence. For an n×m𝑛𝑚n\times m matrix, this reduces the memory requirements from O​(n​m)𝑂𝑛𝑚O(nm) to O​(n+m)𝑂𝑛𝑚O(n+m). We demonstrate empirically using Adam on a large-scale machine translation task known for its expensive models that our approach achieves comparable performance to that obtained using full accumulators.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种减少内存使用同时保留自适应性的经验优势的方法，通过在训练步骤中维护平方梯度累积器的分解表示。具体来说，通过跟踪矩阵值变量的平方梯度的行和与列和的移动平均，我们能够在每个训练步骤重建指数平滑累积器的低秩近似，该近似关于广义 Kullback-Leibler 散度是最优的。对于一个 n×m 矩阵，这将内存需求从 O(nm) 减少到 O(n+m)。我们通过在大规模机器翻译任务（以其昂贵模型著称）上使用 Adam 进行实验证明，我们的方法达到了与使用完整累积器相当的性能。

items.en: Beyond this, we also investigate another issue related to Adam of recent interest. To further reduce memory requirements, we would like to run Adam without momentum, eliminating an additional auxiliary value per model parameter. But without making any other changes, eliminating momentum can cause training instability. We identify out-of-date second moment accumulators as a possible cause of this instability and propose two remedies.
items.zh: 除此之外，我们还研究了另一个与 Adam 相关的近期关注问题。为了进一步减少内存需求，我们希望在没有动量的情况下运行 Adam，从而消除每个模型参数的额外辅助值。但如果不做其他改变，消除动量可能导致训练不稳定。我们将过时的二阶矩累积器识别为这种不稳定性的一个可能原因，并提出了两种补救措施。

items.en: Finally, while the learning rate in Adam denotes a target absolute step size, we follow the intuition that relative change in the parameters is more relevant, so we propose scaling the size of the updates relative to the scale of the parameters themselves.
items.zh: 最后，虽然 Adam 中的学习率表示目标绝对步长，但我们遵循直觉认为参数的相对变化更为相关，因此提出根据参数本身的尺度缩放更新的大小。

items.en: We reproduce the pseudocode for the Adam optimizer in Algorithm 1 for reference (Kingma & Ba, 2015). The setup of the problem is as follows. Suppose we are trying to minimize the expected value of a noisy objective function f​(x)𝑓𝑥f(x). At each step, we receive a stochastic realization ftsubscript𝑓𝑡f_{t}, e.g. the loss computed on a random minibatch of data, and we compute the gradient gtsubscript𝑔𝑡g_{t} of this function with respect to our previous parameters. We then update the exponential running averages of the first and second moments of the gradient mtsubscript𝑚𝑡m_{t} and vtsubscript𝑣𝑡v_{t}, compute bias-corrected versions m^tsubscript^𝑚𝑡\hat{m}_{t} and v^tsubscript^𝑣𝑡\hat{v}_{t} to account for the zero initialization, and finally make a parameter update to obtain a new iterate xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}. This repeats for T𝑇T steps, at which point we return the final iterate xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} as our approximate solution.
items.zh: 我们在算法 1 中重现了 Adam 优化器的伪代码以供参考 (Kingma & Ba, 2015)。问题的设置如下：假设我们试图最小化一个噪声目标函数 f(x) 的期望值。在每一步，我们接收一个随机实现 f_t，例如在随机 minibatch 数据上计算的损失，并计算该函数相对于先前参数的梯度 g_t。然后我们更新梯度的一阶和二阶矩的指数运行平均 m_t 和 v_t，计算偏差校正版本 m̂_t 和 v̂_t 以考虑零初始化，最后进行参数更新以获得新的迭代 x_t。这重复 T 步，然后返回最终迭代 x_T 作为我们的近似解。

items.en: The step size αtsubscript𝛼𝑡\alpha_{t} is often held constant over the course of training, but recent work in large-scale optimization suggests that performance can be improved on some problems through a linear ramp-up followed by some form of decay (Goyal et al., 2017; Vaswani et al., 2017). We use the latter with an inverse square root decay scheme in our experiments, finding it to yield more stable results.
items.zh: 步长 α_t 通常在训练过程中保持不变，但最近在大规模优化中的工作表明，通过线性上升后跟某种形式的衰减，可以在某些问题上提高性能 (Goyal et al., 2017; Vaswani et al., 2017)。我们在实验中使用后者，采用逆平方根衰减方案，发现它产生更稳定的结果。

items.en: Recent work has shown that for problems where vast quantities of data are available, e.g. language modeling and machine translation, task performance improves consistently as model size increases, even in the regime of models with several billions of parameters (Shazeer et al., 2017). As models continue to grow, the storage requirements of one or two auxiliary parameters per model parameter imposed by existing adaptive methods can be prohibitive, motivating the investigation of a low-memory alternative. In this section, we propose a novel approach in which model structure is exploited in order to reduce storage requirements without compromising empirical performance.
items.zh: 最近的工作表明，对于数据量巨大的问题，如语言建模和机器翻译，任务性能随着模型大小的增加而持续提升，即使在具有数十亿参数的模型中也如此 (Shazeer et al., 2017)。随着模型不断增长，现有自适应方法对每个模型参数施加的一个或两个辅助参数的存储需求可能变得过高，这促使我们研究低内存替代方案。在本节中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，利用模型结构来减少存储需求而不损害经验性能。

items.en: Suppose a subset of the model’s parameters are arranged in a matrix, e.g. for use in a linear transformation. We denote this subset by W⊆x𝑊𝑥W\subseteq x with W∈ℝn×m𝑊superscriptℝ𝑛𝑚W\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times m}. Under standard practice, we would need to maintain an exponential moving average V∈ℝn×m𝑉superscriptℝ𝑛𝑚V\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times m} of the corresponding square gradients (∇Wf​(x))2superscriptsubscript∇𝑊𝑓𝑥2(\nabla_{W}f(x))^{2} for use in an adaptive update rule.
items.zh: 假设模型参数的一个子集排列成矩阵，例如用于线性变换。我们将这个子集记为 W ⊆ x，其中 W ∈ ℝ^{n×m}。在标准实践中，我们需要维护对应的平方梯度 (∇_W f(x))^2 的指数移动平均 V ∈ ℝ^{n×m}，用于自适应更新规则。

items.en: In cases where storing the full moving average is infeasible, we might instead seek to store moving averages of some low-rank matrices R∈ℝn×k𝑅superscriptℝ𝑛𝑘R\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times k} and S∈ℝk×m𝑆superscriptℝ𝑘𝑚S\in\mathbb{R}^{k\times m} with k≪n,mmuch-less-than𝑘𝑛𝑚k\ll n,m such that V≈R​S𝑉𝑅𝑆V\approx RS at each step. We note that in general, moving averages of instantaneous factors of V𝑉V may differ from instantaneous factors of the moving average, so standard techniques for low-rank approximation may not necessarily be applicable. We would also like these quantities to be fast to compute so that the approximation step does not become a bottleneck in the overall training procedure.
items.zh: 在存储完整移动平均不可行的情况下，我们可能转而寻求存储一些低秩矩阵 R ∈ ℝ^{n×k} 和 S ∈ ℝ^{k×m}（k ≪ n, m）的移动平均，使得每一步 V ≈ RS。我们注意到，一般来说，V 的瞬时因子的移动平均可能不同于移动平均的瞬时因子，因此标准的低秩近似技术不一定适用。我们还希望这些量计算快速，以便近似步骤不会成为整个训练过程的瓶颈。

items.en: One common choice for low-rank approximation is to truncate the singular value decomposition at the top k𝑘k singular values. This is known to give the optimal projection onto the space of rank-k𝑘k matrices with respect to the Frobenius norm (Eckart & Young, 1936). While heavily tuned procedures exist for finding the top k𝑘k singular values and vectors of a matrix, these quantities in general do not decompose over matrix addition, implying an incompatibility with exponential smoothing. Moreover, there is no guarantee that the entries of the approximation will be nonnegative, which is problematic given that we would like to scale the gradient by the componentwise inverse square root.
items.zh: 低秩近似的一个常见选择是截断奇异值分解，保留前 k 个奇异值。已知这给出了关于 Frobenius 范数到秩 k 矩阵空间的最优投影 (Eckart & Young, 1936)。虽然存在高度调优的过程来寻找矩阵的前 k 个奇异值和奇异向量，但这些量通常不分解矩阵加法，这意味着与指数平滑不兼容。此外，无法保证近似的条目非负，这对于我们希望按分量逆平方根缩放梯度来说是有问题的。

items.en: In search of a more suitable alternative, we turn to techniques from nonnegative matrix factorization. In addition to the Frobenius norm, another popular cost function in the literature is the generalized Kullback-Leibler divergence, also known as the I-divergence (Lee & Seung, 1999). For nonnegative scalar inputs, the I-divergence is given by the equation
items.zh: 为了寻找更合适的替代方案，我们转向非负矩阵分解的技术。除了 Frobenius 范数，文献中另一个流行的代价函数是广义 Kullback-Leibler 散度，也称为 I-散度 (Lee & Seung, 1999)。对于非负标量输入，I-散度由以下方程给出：

items.en: with the conventions that 0/0=00000/0=0, 0​log⁡0=00000\log 0=0, and p/0=∞𝑝0p/0=\infty for p>0𝑝0p>0. It is easily seen that d​(p,q)≥0𝑑𝑝𝑞0d(p,q)\geq 0 with equality iff p=q𝑝𝑞p=q by setting x=p/q𝑥𝑝𝑞x=p/q in the standard inequality x​log⁡x≥x−1𝑥𝑥𝑥1x\log x\geq x-1. Under this cost function, we aim to minimize the total elementwise divergence subject to componentwise nonnegativity constraints:
items.zh: 约定 0/0=0，0 log 0=0，且对于 p>0，p/0=∞。容易看出 d(p,q) ≥ 0，当且仅当 p=q 时取等，通过设 x=p/q 于标准不等式 x log x ≥ x-1。在此代价函数下，我们旨在在逐分量非负约束下最小化总元素散度：

items.en: Solving this problem for general rank-k𝑘k factors is nontrivial, requiring for instance the use of an alternating minimization procedure (Finesso & Spreij, 2006). In the special case of rank-1 factors, however, we can derive an analytic solution.
items.zh: 对于一般的秩 k 因子，解决这个问题并不简单，例如需要使用交替最小化过程 (Finesso & Spreij, 2006)。然而，在秩 1 因子的特殊情况下，我们可以推导出解析解。

items.en: The solution set of the optimization problem (1) when k=1𝑘1k=1 consists of all feasible pairs (R,S)𝑅𝑆(R,S) satisfying R​S=V​1m​1n⊤​V/1n⊤​V​1m𝑅𝑆𝑉subscript1𝑚superscriptsubscript1𝑛top𝑉superscriptsubscript1𝑛top𝑉subscript1𝑚RS=V1_{m}1_{n}^{\top}V/1_{n}^{\top}V1_{m}, where 1ℓ=(1,…,1)∈ℝℓsubscript1ℓ1…1superscriptℝℓ1_{\ell}=(1,\dots,1)\in\mathbb{R}^{\ell} denotes a column vector of ℓℓ\ell ones.
items.zh: 当 k=1 时，优化问题 (1) 的解集由所有满足 RS = V1_m 1_n^⊤ V / 1_n^⊤ V 1_m 的可行对 (R,S) 组成，其中 1_ℓ = (1,…,1) ∈ ℝ^ℓ 表示 ℓ 个 1 的列向量。

items.en: Let R𝑅R and S𝑆S be any feasible solution. Noting that [R​S]i​j=Ri​Sjsubscriptdelimited-[]𝑅𝑆𝑖𝑗subscript𝑅𝑖subscript𝑆𝑗[RS]_{ij}=R_{i}S_{j} and expanding the loss, we have
items.zh: 设 R 和 S 为任意可行解。注意到 [RS]_{ij} = R_i S_j，展开损失，我们有：

items.zh: 将表达式对 R_i 和 S_j 的导数设为 0，我们得到关系：

items.en: Now note that for any minimizer (R,S)𝑅𝑆(R,S), the solution (α​R,S/α)𝛼𝑅𝑆𝛼(\alpha R,S/\alpha) is also a minimizer for any α>0𝛼0\alpha>0, since the loss only depends on the product R​S𝑅𝑆RS. Hence we may break the symmetry by fixing the sum of the components of R𝑅R at ∑i=1nRi=∑i=1n∑j=1mVi​jsuperscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑛subscript𝑅𝑖superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑛superscriptsubscript𝑗1𝑚subscript𝑉𝑖𝑗\sum_{i=1}^{n}R_{i}=\sum_{i=1}^{n}\sum_{j=1}^{m}V_{ij}, in which case we obtain a canonical minimizer
items.zh: 现在注意到对于任何最小化器 (R,S)，解 (αR, S/α) 对于任何 α>0 也是最小化器，因为损失仅依赖于乘积 RS。因此，我们可以通过固定 R 的分量之和为 ∑_i R_i = ∑_i ∑_j V_{ij} 来打破对称性，此时我们得到规范最小化器：

items.en: By our discussion of symmetry above, it follows that the solution set consists more broadly of all pairs (R,S)𝑅𝑆(R,S) satisfying R​S=V​1m​1n⊤​V/1n⊤​V​1m𝑅𝑆𝑉subscript1𝑚superscriptsubscript1𝑛top𝑉superscriptsubscript1𝑛top𝑉subscript1𝑚RS=V1_{m}1_{n}^{\top}V/1_{n}^{\top}V1_{m}, and the claim follows. ∎
items.zh: 根据上述对称性讨论，解集更广泛地由所有满足 RS = V1_m 1_n^⊤ V / 1_n^⊤ V 1_m 的对 (R,S) 组成，结论成立。∎

items.en: We now note some important properties of this rank-1 projection. First, if V𝑉V itself is a rank-1 matrix, then it will be exactly recovered as one would expect. Second, the projection can be expressed entirely in terms of the row sums V​1m𝑉subscript1𝑚V1_{m} and column sums 1n⊤​Vsuperscriptsubscript1𝑛top𝑉1_{n}^{\top}V, which in particular are linear functions of V𝑉V. This convenient fact gives us the desired compatibility with exponential smoothing, since the row sums of the moving average equal the moving average of the row sums, and similarly for columns. Moreover, storing only the moving averages of these factors rather than the full matrix V𝑉V yields considerable memory savings, requiring space proportional to n+m𝑛𝑚n+m rather than n​m𝑛𝑚nm.
items.zh: 我们现在注意到这个秩-1投影的一些重要性质。首先，如果 V 本身是秩-1矩阵，那么它将按预期被精确恢复。其次，该投影可以完全用行和 V1_m 与列和 1_n^T V 表示，这些特别地是 V 的线性函数。这一便利事实使我们能够与指数平滑兼容，因为移动平均的行和等于行和的移动平均，列和同理。此外，仅存储这些因子的移动平均而非完整矩阵 V 可显著节省内存，所需空间与 n+m 成正比而非 n*m。

items.en: We present a concrete implementation of Adam with factored second moment accumulators in Algorithm 2 for the case where the parameter set x𝑥x can be viewed as a single matrix X𝑋X. In the event that the parameter set is most suitably partitioned into multiple matrices (treating vectors and scalars as special cases), the steps can be performed in parallel for each matrix individually. We present the algorithm with β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1} fixed at 0 so as to focus our attention on the second moments. First moments can be included as in Adam without modification if desired.
items.zh: 我们在算法2中给出了Adam在参数集 x 可视为单个矩阵 X 的情况下的具体实现，其中使用了分解的二阶矩累积器。如果参数集最适合划分为多个矩阵（将向量和标量视为特殊情况），则可以对每个矩阵并行执行这些步骤。我们固定 β1=0 以将注意力集中在二阶矩上。如果需要，可以像Adam中那样包含一阶矩而不作修改。

items.en: In the implementation, we keep running averages of the row sums Rtsubscript𝑅𝑡R_{t} and column sums Ctsubscript𝐶𝑡C_{t} of the squared gradients. The full accumulator is then approximated as the outer product divided by the sum of all entries, Rt​Ct/1n⊤​Rtsubscript𝑅𝑡subscript𝐶𝑡superscriptsubscript1𝑛topsubscript𝑅𝑡R_{t}C_{t}/1_{n}^{\top}R_{t}, and is subsequently scaled by the same bias correction factor as in Adam. We note that the normalization term in the denominator 1n⊤​Rtsuperscriptsubscript1𝑛topsubscript𝑅𝑡1_{n}^{\top}R_{t} could equivalently be expressed as Ct​1msubscript𝐶𝑡subscript1𝑚C_{t}1_{m}, so the treatment of row sums and column sums is not asymmetric despite the surface form of the approximation.
items.zh: 在实现中，我们保持平方梯度的行和 R_t 与列和 C_t 的移动平均。然后，完整累积器近似为外积除以所有元素之和，即 R_t C_t / 1_n^T R_t，并随后使用与Adam相同的偏差校正因子进行缩放。我们注意到分母中的归一化项 1_n^T R_t 也可以等价地表示为 C_t 1_m，因此尽管近似形式表面如此，行和与列和的处理并非不对称。

items.en: A preliminary version of this method was briefly mentioned in Appendix D of Shazeer et al. (2017). Also, Gupta et al. (2014) employ a similar technique, saving memory by averaging Adagrad accumulators across embedding vectors.
items.zh: 该方法的初步版本曾在Shazeer等人(2017)的附录D中简要提及。此外，Gupta等人(2014)使用了类似技术，通过跨嵌入向量平均Adagrad累积器来节省内存。

items.en: We ran the Transformer model from Vaswani et al. (2017), using Adam with and without our factored second moment estimation for optimization. See Section 9 for more details on the experimental setup. Results were similar in all tested cases. See Table 2 (A) vs. (C) and (H) vs. (J).
items.zh: 我们运行了Vaswani等人(2017)的Transformer模型，分别使用标准Adam和我们的分解二阶矩估计进行优化。实验设置详见第9节。所有测试案例的结果相似。见表2中的(A)与(C)以及(H)与(J)。

items.en: We also tried simplified estimation schemes where the second-moment estimators for matrices were approximated by either the row means or the column means (but not their outer product). For this model, the results for the row-mean scheme were similar to baseline, but the results for the column mean scheme were much worse. See Table 2 (D) and (E). We suspect that these results are due to the model’s use of a shared weight matrix used both to represent the token embeddings and to produce the output probabilities. Each row in this matrix corresponds to one token in the vocabulary. Rows associated with very frequent tokens tend to receive gradients of much larger magnitude than rows associated with very infrequent tokens.
items.zh: 我们还尝试了简化估计方案，其中矩阵的二阶矩估计器近似为行均值或列均值（而非其外积）。对于该模型，行均值方案的结果与基线相似，但列均值方案的结果差得多。见表2中的(D)和(E)。我们怀疑这些结果是由于模型使用了共享权重矩阵，该矩阵既用于表示词嵌入又用于生成输出概率。该矩阵的每一行对应词汇表中的一个词。与高频词关联的行往往比与低频词关联的行接收到幅度大得多的梯度。

items.en: Adam requires two persistent accumulators per parameter for the first and second moments of the gradients. In Section 3, we reduced the memory requirements of the second-moment accumulator. To remove the need for a first-moment accumulator, we simply turn momentum off by setting β1=0subscript𝛽10\beta_{1}=0.
items.zh: Adam为每个参数需要两个持久累积器来存储梯度的一阶和二阶矩。在第3节中，我们减少了二阶矩累积器的内存需求。为了消除对一阶矩累积器的需求，我们通过设置 β1=0 来关闭动量。

items.en: For a step size schedule similar to the one used in Vaswani et al. (2017), which includes a warmup period, model quality is similar without and with momentum (BLEU = 23.6 vs. 23.4) – see Table 2 (A) vs. (B), second to last column.
items.zh: 对于与Vaswani等人(2017)中使用的类似步长调度（包含预热期），有无动量的模型质量相似（BLEU=23.6 vs. 23.4）——见表2中的(A)与(B)，倒数第二列。

items.en: Without the warmup period, the model without momentum becomes more unstable (BLEU = 0.1 vs. 23.1) – see Table 2 (A) vs. (B), last column. We hypothesize that removing the momentum unmasks an underlying problem with the stability of Adam, which we will discuss in the next section.
items.zh: 在没有预热期的情况下，无动量模型变得不稳定（BLEU=0.1 vs. 23.1）——见表2中的(A)与(B)，最后一列。我们假设移除动量暴露了Adam稳定性的潜在问题，我们将在下一节讨论。

full.sec: 5 A Problem with Adam: Out-of-Date Second Moment Estimator
full.secZh: 5 Adam的问题：过时的二阶矩估计

items.en: Reddi et al. (2018) discuss non-convergence issues when using a fast decay of the second-moment estimator (low β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2}). We observe the same issues in our experiments – see Table 1, first result column. On the other hand, slow decay (high β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2}) causes training instability when we turn off the step size warmup – see Table 1, second result column.
items.zh: Reddi等人(2018)讨论了使用快速衰减的二阶矩估计器（低 β2）时的非收敛问题。我们在实验中观察到相同的问题——见表1，第一结果列。另一方面，慢速衰减（高 β2）在关闭步长预热时导致训练不稳定——见表1，第二结果列。

items.en: We explain the instability as follows: A slow decay rate means that our second-moment estimator is based on gradients farther in the past. If the model is evolving rapidly, this could cause the estimates to have high error, leading to smaller-than-desired or (worse) larger-than-desired updates. To check whether this is happening, we observe the root-mean-square over all parameters x𝑥x in a weight matrix or vector X𝑋X for a given timestep t𝑡t of the unscaled parameter update ux​t=−gx​t/v^x​tsubscript𝑢𝑥𝑡subscript𝑔𝑥𝑡subscript^𝑣𝑥𝑡u_{xt}=-g_{xt}/\sqrt{\hat{v}_{xt}}. For brevity, we refer to this quantity as RMS​(Ut)RMSsubscript𝑈𝑡\mathrm{RMS}(U_{t}):
items.zh: 我们将不稳定性解释如下：慢速衰减率意味着我们的二阶矩估计器基于更早的梯度。如果模型快速演化，这可能导致估计误差高，从而产生小于期望或（更糟）大于期望的更新。为了检查是否如此，我们观察权重矩阵或向量 X 中所有参数 x 在时间步 t 的未缩放参数更新 u_{xt} = -g_{xt} / sqrt(v̂_{xt}) 的均方根。为简洁起见，我们将此量称为 RMS(U_t)：

items.en: If Adam is functioning as intended, for each individual parameter x𝑥x, the value v^x​tsubscript^𝑣𝑥𝑡\hat{v}_{xt} should be close to (gx​t)2superscriptsubscript𝑔𝑥𝑡2(g_{xt})^{2}, since this is precisely what v^x​tsubscript^𝑣𝑥𝑡\hat{v}_{xt} is designed to measure. Thus, the ratio (gx​t)2/v^x​tsuperscriptsubscript𝑔𝑥𝑡2subscript^𝑣𝑥𝑡(g_{xt})^{2}/\hat{v}_{xt} should be close to 1, as should the mean of many such values. So for a large weight matrix X𝑋X, a value of RMS​(Ut)RMSsubscript𝑈𝑡\mathrm{RMS}(U_{t}) which is far from 1 is a sign that the second-moment estimator is not doing its job well.
items.zh: 如果Adam按预期工作，对于每个单独参数 x，值 v̂_{xt} 应接近 (g_{xt})^2，因为这正是 v̂_{xt} 设计要测量的。因此，比值 (g_{xt})^2 / v̂_{xt} 应接近1，多个此类值的均值也应如此。所以对于大型权重矩阵 X，RMS(U_t) 的值远离1是二阶矩估计器工作不佳的标志。

items.en: In Figure 1, we plot RMS​(Ut)RMSsubscript𝑈𝑡\mathrm{RMS}(U_{t}) for one particular weight matrix in a Transformer machine translation model (Vaswani et al., 2017) for training runs with β2=0.9subscript𝛽20.9\beta_{2}=0.9 and β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999. With fast decay (red), RMS​(Ut)RMSsubscript𝑈𝑡\mathrm{RMS}(U_{t}) stays close to 111 as expected, while with slow decay (blue), it fluctuates significantly. Values larger than 1 indicate larger-than-desired parameter updates.
items.zh: 在图1中，我们绘制了Transformer机器翻译模型（Vaswani等人，2017）中特定权重矩阵在 β2=0.9 和 β2=0.999 训练运行下的 RMS(U_t)。快速衰减（红色）时，RMS(U_t) 如预期保持在1附近，而慢速衰减（蓝色）时则显著波动。大于1的值表示参数更新大于期望。

items.en: The fact that slow decay causes both larger-than-desired updates and training instability supports our hypothesis that the large updates are the cause of the instability, but does not prove it. One competing hypothesis is that the instability causes the larger-than-desired updates. We refute this particular competing hypothesis by noting that the R​M​S​(Ut)𝑅𝑀𝑆subscript𝑈𝑡RMS(U_{t}) values plotted in Figure 1 are for training runs with step size warmup, neither of which exhibited instability. In the next section, we further support our hypothesis by showing that we can cure the instability by clipping the larger-than-desired updates.
items.zh: 慢速衰减同时导致大于期望的更新和训练不稳定这一事实支持了我们的假设，即大更新是不稳定的原因，但并未证明。一个竞争假设是不稳定导致大于期望的更新。我们通过指出图1中绘制的 RMS(U_t) 值来自带有步长预热的训练运行（两者均未表现出不稳定）来反驳这一特定竞争假设。在下一节中，我们通过展示可以通过裁剪大于期望的更新来治愈不稳定，进一步支持我们的假设。

items.capEn: Figure 1: With slow decay (β2=0.999)subscript𝛽20.999(\beta_{2}=0.999), the second-moment estimator is out of date, leading to parameter updates that are larger or smaller than the intended value.
items.capZh: 图1：慢速衰减（β2=0.999）时，二阶矩估计器过时，导致参数更新大于或小于预期值。

items.en: To remove the larger-than-desired updates described in Section 5, we propose scaling down the updates on a weight vector or matrix X𝑋X whenever RMS​(Ut)RMSsubscript𝑈𝑡\mathrm{RMS}(U_{t}) exceeds a threshold value d𝑑d. We define the clipped unscaled update U^tsubscript^𝑈𝑡\hat{U}_{t} as:
items.zh: 为了消除第5节中描述的大于期望的更新，我们提出在权重向量或矩阵 X 上，每当 RMS(U_t) 超过阈值 d 时，按比例缩小更新。我们将裁剪后的未缩放更新 Û_t 定义为：

items.en: The actual parameter update is then the product αt​U^tsubscript𝛼𝑡subscript^𝑈𝑡\alpha_{t}\hat{U}_{t} of the step size and the clipped unscaled update, as in Algorithm 4.
items.zh: 实际参数更新则是步长 α_t 与裁剪后的未缩放更新 Û_t 的乘积，如算法4所示。

items.en: Gradient clipping is a popular heuristic used for training neural networks in which the gradient is scaled down before an update if needed to ensure that its norm never exceeds some fixed threshold (Pascanu et al., 2013). For stochastic gradient descent, the update direction is exactly the gradient, so this also has the effect of putting an upper bound on the distance traveled in each step. While gradient clipping is also applied to adaptive methods in practice, the norm of the update direction may still exceed the user-imposed threshold due to the presence of additional per-parameter scaling factors. In update clipping, we cap the norm of the actual update rather than just the gradient.
items.zh: 梯度裁剪是一种流行的启发式方法，用于训练神经网络，即在更新前根据需要缩小梯度，以确保其范数不超过某个固定阈值（Pascanu等人，2013）。对于随机梯度下降，更新方向就是梯度，因此这也对每一步移动的距离施加了上限。虽然实践中梯度裁剪也应用于自适应方法，但由于存在额外的逐参数缩放因子，更新方向的范数仍可能超过用户设定的阈值。在更新裁剪中，我们限制实际更新的范数而不仅仅是梯度。

items.en: We added update clipping to the previously described fast-decay experiments. For the experiment without learning rate warmup, update clipping with d=1𝑑1d=1 significantly ameliorated the instability problem – see Table 2 (A) vs. (H). With d=2𝑑2d=2, the instability was not improved. Update clipping did not significantly affect the experiments with warmup (with no instability problems).
items.zh: 我们将更新裁剪添加到之前描述的快速衰减实验中。在没有学习率预热的实验中，d=1 的更新裁剪显著改善了不稳定问题——见表2中的(A)与(H)。当 d=2 时，不稳定性未改善。更新裁剪对带有预热（无稳定性问题）的实验没有显著影响。

items.en: An alternative solution to the problems described in Section 5 is to use an increasing schedule of β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2}, as proposed by Reddi et al. (2018). Perhaps this can give us the best of both worlds – see Table 1, where different decay rates are better in different situations.
items.zh: 针对第5节所述问题的另一种解决方案是使用递增的 β2 调度，如Reddi等人(2018)所提出的。也许这可以让我们两全其美——见表1，其中不同衰减率在不同情况下表现更好。

items.en: We point out here that Adam already uses an increasing decay parameter if we rewrite the bias correction as a correction to β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2}. To do this, we define β2^t=β2​1−β2t−11−β2tsubscript^subscript𝛽2𝑡subscript𝛽21superscriptsubscript𝛽2𝑡11superscriptsubscript𝛽2𝑡\hat{\beta_{2}}_{t}=\beta_{2}\frac{1-\beta_{2}^{t-1}}{1-\beta_{2}^{t}}, and we compute v^tsubscript^𝑣𝑡\hat{v}_{t} directly in terms of v^t−1subscript^𝑣𝑡1\hat{v}_{t-1} as follows:
items.zh: 我们在此指出，如果将偏差修正重写为对β2的修正，Adam实际上已经使用了一个递增的衰减参数。为此，我们定义β2^t = β2 * (1 - β2^(t-1)) / (1 - β2^t)，并直接根据v̂_{t-1}计算v̂_t如下：

items.en: This, along with similar logic for β1subscript𝛽1\beta_{1}, leads to the alternative formulation of Adam in Algorithm 3.
items.zh: 这一点，连同对β1的类似逻辑，引出了算法3中Adam的另一种表述。

items.en: In our reformulation of Adam, the corrected decay parameter β2^t=β2​1−β2t−11−β2tsubscript^subscript𝛽2𝑡subscript𝛽21superscriptsubscript𝛽2𝑡11superscriptsubscript𝛽2𝑡\hat{\beta_{2}}_{t}=\beta_{2}\frac{1-\beta_{2}^{t-1}}{1-\beta_{2}^{t}} starts at 00 when t=1𝑡1t=1 and asymptotically approaches β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2} for large values of t𝑡t.
items.zh: 在我们对Adam的重新表述中，修正后的衰减参数β2^t = β2 * (1 - β2^(t-1)) / (1 - β2^t) 在t=1时从0开始，并随着t的增大渐近地趋近于β2。

items.en: Alternatively, we propose the family of schedules
items.zh: 或者，我们提出一族调度方案

items.en: parameterized by a scalar c>0𝑐0c>0 controlling the rate of increase.
items.zh: 由一个标量c>0参数化，控制增长速率。

items.en: By inspection, it is clear that this schedule starts at 0 for t=1𝑡1t=1 and increases toward 1 as t𝑡t tends to ∞\infty. This allows us to benefit from the stability properties of a low β2^tsubscript^subscript𝛽2𝑡\hat{\beta_{2}}_{t} at the start of training while still realizing the gains in performance due to a high β2^tsubscript^subscript𝛽2𝑡\hat{\beta_{2}}_{t} as the run progresses.
items.zh: 通过观察，显然该调度在t=1时从0开始，并随着t趋于无穷大而增加到1。这使我们能够在训练初期受益于低β2^t的稳定性，同时在训练过程中随着β2^t的升高实现性能提升。

items.en: Less obviously, this schedule also eliminates the need for bias correction. To see why, we begin by expanding the recursive definition of vtsubscript𝑣𝑡v_{t} to arrive at
items.zh: 不太明显的是，这种调度也消除了偏差修正的必要性。为了理解原因，我们首先展开v_t的递归定义得到

items.en: Taking expectations of both sides, we have
items.zh: 对两边取期望，我们有

items.en: We would like the expected moving average 𝔼​[vt]𝔼delimited-[]subscript𝑣𝑡\mathbb{E}[v_{t}] to be as close as possible to the true second moment 𝔼​[gt2]𝔼delimited-[]superscriptsubscript𝑔𝑡2\mathbb{E}[g_{t}^{2}]. If we assume as in Kingma & Ba (2015) that the gradient distribution is stationary or that the errors 𝔼​[gi2]−𝔼​[gt2]𝔼delimited-[]superscriptsubscript𝑔𝑖2𝔼delimited-[]superscriptsubscript𝑔𝑡2\mathbb{E}[g_{i}^{2}]-\mathbb{E}[g_{t}^{2}] are sufficiently small, then it suffices to check that our proposed decay schedule satisfies
items.zh: 我们希望期望移动平均E[v_t]尽可能接近真实的二阶矩E[g_t^2]。如果像Kingma & Ba (2015)中那样假设梯度分布是平稳的，或者误差E[g_i^2] - E[g_t^2]足够小，那么只需检查我们提出的衰减调度是否满足

items.en: since this would imply 𝔼​[vt]𝔼delimited-[]subscript𝑣𝑡\mathbb{E}[v_{t}] and 𝔼​[gt2]𝔼delimited-[]superscriptsubscript𝑔𝑡2\mathbb{E}[g_{t}^{2}] are equal in the stationary case or equal up to a small error term otherwise. We will also require that for all i≥1𝑖1i\geq 1,
items.zh: 因为这意味着在平稳情况下E[v_t]和E[g_t^2]相等，否则相差一个小的误差项。我们还需要对于所有i≥1，

items.en: which means that the contributions of past gradients will go to 0 as training progresses rather than retaining nontrivial weight for all time.
items.zh: 这意味着过去梯度的贡献将随着训练进行而趋于0，而不是在所有时间都保持非平凡的权重。

items.en: We verify the first property with a simple induction argument. At time t=1𝑡1t=1, we have 1−β2^1=11subscript^subscript𝛽2111-\hat{\beta_{2}}_{1}=1 as desired. Then if the equality holds at time t−1𝑡1t-1, we have
items.zh: 我们用一个简单的归纳论证来验证第一个性质。在时间t=1时，我们有1 - β̂2_1 = 1，符合要求。然后如果等式在t-1时成立，我们有

items.en: which completes the argument. We remark that this proof in fact goes through for any schedule for which β2^1=0subscript^subscript𝛽210\hat{\beta_{2}}_{1}=0.
items.zh: 这就完成了论证。我们注意到，这个证明实际上对任何满足β̂2_1 = 0的调度都成立。

items.en: The second condition is more restrictive in comparison. For the proposed schedule, we would like it to be true that
items.zh: 相比之下，第二个条件更具限制性。对于所提出的调度，我们希望对于所有i≥1，

items.en: for all i≥1𝑖1i\geq 1. Using the standard result that for a sequence 0≤an<10subscript𝑎𝑛10\leq a_{n}<1, the infinite product ∏n(1−an)subscriptproduct𝑛1subscript𝑎𝑛\prod_{n}(1-a_{n}) converges to a nonzero value iff the series ∑nansubscript𝑛subscript𝑎𝑛\sum_{n}a_{n} converges, we see that the limit above will be 0 iff the series ∑j=2∞1/jcsuperscriptsubscript𝑗21superscript𝑗𝑐\sum_{j=2}^{\infty}1/j^{c} diverges, which is only true for c≤1𝑐1c\leq 1. Hence the decay parameter must not increase too fast, as otherwise past gradients will maintain a weight bounded away from 0 for the full duration of training. In the special case where c=1𝑐1c=1, we note that vt=∑i=1tgi2/tsubscript𝑣𝑡superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑡superscriptsubscript𝑔𝑖2𝑡v_{t}=\sum_{i=1}^{t}g_{i}^{2}/t reduces to a simple arithmetic moving average of the history of squared gradients.
items.zh: 成立。利用标准结论：对于序列0 ≤ a_n < 1，无穷乘积∏_n (1 - a_n)收敛到非零值当且仅当级数∑_n a_n收敛，我们看到上述极限为0当且仅当级数∑_{j=2}^∞ 1/j^c发散，这仅在c ≤ 1时成立。因此，衰减参数不能增长太快，否则过去梯度将在整个训练过程中保持非零权重。在c=1的特殊情况下，我们注意到v_t = ∑_{i=1}^t g_i^2 / t 简化为平方梯度历史的简单算术移动平均。

items.en: We added this alternative to our experimental baseline – see Table 2 lines (A) vs. (K), (L), (M). The schedule β2^t=1−t−0.5subscript^subscript𝛽2𝑡1superscript𝑡0.5\hat{\beta_{2}}_{t}=1-t^{-0.5} did in fact maintain both stability and convergence. When combined with update clipping, this method produced similar results to constant high β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2} with update clipping – see Table 2 lines (H) vs. (N).
items.zh: 我们将这种替代方案添加到我们的实验基线中——见表2中(A)与(K)、(L)、(M)行。调度β̂2_t = 1 - t^{-0.5}确实同时保持了稳定性和收敛性。当与更新裁剪结合时，该方法产生了与恒定高β2配合更新裁剪相似的结果——见表2中(H)与(N)行。

items.en: Instead of defining the optimization algorithm in terms of absolute step sizes {αt}t=1Tsuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝛼𝑡𝑡1𝑇\{\alpha_{t}\}_{t=1}^{T}, we propose defining the optimization algorithm in terms of relative step sizes {ρt}t=1Tsuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝜌𝑡𝑡1𝑇\{\rho_{t}\}_{t=1}^{T}, which get multiplied by the scale of the parameters. We define the scale of a parameter vector or matrix as the root-mean-square of its components, lower-bounded by a small constant ϵ2subscriptitalic-ϵ2\epsilon_{2}. The reason for this lower bound is to allow zero-initialized parameters to escape 0. Combining this with the other proposals in this paper gives the Adafactor algorithm defined in Algorithms 4 and 5. Proposed hyperparameters for Adafactor are listed in Algorithm 6.
items.zh: 我们建议不采用绝对步长{α_t}_{t=1}^T来定义优化算法，而是采用相对步长{ρ_t}_{t=1}^T，它乘以参数的尺度。我们将参数向量或矩阵的尺度定义为其分量的均方根，下限为一个小常数ε_2。这个下限的目的是允许零初始化的参数逃离0。将这一点与本文中的其他建议相结合，得到了算法4和5中定义的Adafactor算法。Adafactor的建议超参数列在算法6中。

items.en: To examine the potential benefit of relative step size, we use a version of Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) where the token-embedding parameters are not reused in the softmax layer. The authors cleverly initialize the embedding parameters with standard deviation 1dmodel1subscript𝑑model\frac{1}{\sqrt{d_{\mathrm{model}}}}, similarly to the other parameters, and then scale them up in the computation by a factor of dmodelsubscript𝑑model\sqrt{d_{\mathrm{model}}} so that the embeddings start out with unit norm. This allows the same absolute step size to work for both the embedding parameters and the other weight matrices in the model. We test Adam and Adafactor with this “clever” embedding scheme, but also with two more naive schemes. In the first, we initialize the embedding parameters with standard deviation 111 and do not scale them in the computation. In the second, we initialize the embedding parameters with standard deviation 1dmodel1subscript𝑑model\frac{1}{\sqrt{d_{\mathrm{model}}}}, and do not scale them in the computation. For the Adam experiments, we use the hyperparameters and step size scheme from Vaswani et al. (2017). For the Adafactor experiments, we use our recommended hyperparameters listed in Algorithm 6. All models are trained for 50,000 steps with batch size 16,384 tokens (unlike the other experiments in this paper). Results are given in Table 3. Adafactor proves more resilient to the more naive parameter initialization and scaling schemes.
items.zh: 为了检验相对步长的潜在优势，我们使用了一个Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017）的变体，其中词嵌入参数不在softmax层中重用。作者巧妙地将嵌入参数初始化为标准差1/√d_model，与其他参数类似，然后在计算中将其缩放√d_model倍，使得嵌入初始时具有单位范数。这使得相同的绝对步长对嵌入参数和模型中的其他权重矩阵都有效。我们使用这种“巧妙”的嵌入方案测试了Adam和Adafactor，但也使用了两种更朴素的方案。在第一种方案中，我们将嵌入参数初始化为标准差1，并且在计算中不进行缩放。在第二种方案中，我们将嵌入参数初始化为标准差1/√d_model，并且在计算中不进行缩放。对于Adam实验，我们使用Vaswani et al. (2017)中的超参数和步长方案。对于Adafactor实验，我们使用算法6中列出的推荐超参数。所有模型训练50,000步，批次大小为16,384个token（与本文其他实验不同）。结果见表3。Adafactor对更朴素的参数初始化和缩放方案表现出更强的鲁棒性。

items.en: We evaluated the optimization algorithms described in this paper on the Transformer machine translation model described in Vaswani et al. (2017) on the same WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task described in that paper, using the latest version of the architecture from the Tensor2Tensor open-source repository.
items.zh: 我们在Vaswani et al. (2017)描述的Transformer机器翻译模型上评估了本文描述的优化算法，使用该论文中相同的WMT 2014英德翻译任务，并采用Tensor2Tensor开源代码库中最新版本的架构。

items.en: Models were trained for 100,000 steps. Each training batch contained sentence pairs containing approximately 4,096 tokens in the input and 4,096 tokens in the target sentences. These batches are about 8 times smaller than the ones used by Vaswani et al. (2017). This causes our results to be slightly worse, but significantly speeds up training times (less than two hours each on one Google TPU v2).
items.zh: 模型训练了100,000步。每个训练批次包含大约4,096个输入token和4,096个目标token的句子对。这些批次比Vaswani et al. (2017)使用的批次小约8倍。这导致我们的结果稍差，但显著加快了训练时间（每个模型在单块Google TPU v2上不到两小时）。

items.en: In one set of experiments, we followed a similar step size schedule as Vaswani et al. (2017) consisting of a linear warmup followed by inverse-square root decay, given by αt=0.1⋅min⁡(10−6⋅t,1t)subscript𝛼𝑡⋅0.1⋅superscript106𝑡1𝑡\alpha_{t}=0.1\cdot\min(10^{-6}\cdot t,\frac{1}{\sqrt{t}}). In order to test training stability, we ran a second set of experiments where the initial warmup was replaced by a flat learning rate: αt=0.1⋅min⁡(10−2,1t)subscript𝛼𝑡⋅0.1superscript1021𝑡\alpha_{t}=0.1\cdot\min(10^{-2},\frac{1}{\sqrt{t}}). For the experiments with relative step sizes, we used schedules ρt=min⁡(10−6⋅t,1t)subscript𝜌𝑡⋅superscript106𝑡1𝑡\rho_{t}=\min(10^{-6}\cdot t,\frac{1}{\sqrt{t}}) and ρt=min⁡(10−2,1t)subscript𝜌𝑡superscript1021𝑡\rho_{t}=\min(10^{-2},\frac{1}{\sqrt{t}}).
items.zh: 在一组实验中，我们采用了与 Vaswani 等人 (2017) 类似的步长调度，包括线性预热后接逆平方根衰减，由 αt=0.1⋅min(10⁻⁶⋅t, 1/√t) 给出。为了测试训练稳定性，我们进行了第二组实验，其中初始预热被替换为恒定学习率：αt=0.1⋅min(10⁻², 1/√t)。对于相对步长的实验，我们使用了调度 ρt=min(10⁻⁶⋅t, 1/√t) 和 ρt=min(10⁻², 1/√t)。

items.en: In addition, we tested plain SGD with learning rate schemes equal to the step size schemes above, multiplied by various constants, since SGD also requires little (zero) additional memory cost.
items.zh: 此外，我们测试了普通 SGD，其学习率方案等于上述步长方案乘以各种常数，因为 SGD 也需要很少（零）的额外内存成本。

items.en: Results are listed in Table 2. The listed BLEU scores are on the development set, newstest2013, using beam search with beam size 4 and length penalty α=0.6𝛼0.6\alpha=0.6. Higher scores are better. Note that the scores listed should not be compared to those in Vaswani et al. (2017), due to both our shorter training regime and various improvements in the open-source version of the model over the published version.
items.zh: 结果列于表 2。所列 BLEU 分数是在开发集 newstest2013 上，使用束搜索（束宽为 4，长度惩罚 α=0.6）得到的。分数越高越好。注意，由于我们的训练方案较短以及开源版本模型相比已发表版本的各种改进，所列分数不应与 Vaswani 等人 (2017) 中的分数进行比较。

items.en: The schemes with warmup mostly achieved very similar results. Fast decay of the second-moment estimator (G) was significantly worse.
items.zh: 带有预热的方案大多取得了非常相似的结果。二阶矩估计的快速衰减（G）明显更差。

items.en: Without warmup, the baseline (A) becomes unstable. The instability is relieved by any of momentum (B), fast decay (G), variable decay (K), and gradient clipping (H). It is not clear whether relative step size has an affect on stability, since the step sizes used in the experiments are not directly comparable.
items.zh: 没有预热时，基线（A）变得不稳定。这种不稳定性可以通过动量（B）、快速衰减（G）、可变衰减（K）和梯度裁剪（H）中的任何一种来缓解。目前尚不清楚相对步长是否对稳定性有影响，因为实验中使用的步长不能直接比较。

items.en: Rows (J) and (N) demonstrate algorithms with sub-linear additional memory requirements which attain comparable convergence and stability results to Adam with momentum.
items.zh: 行（J）和（N）展示了具有次线性额外内存需求的算法，这些算法获得了与带动量的 Adam 相当的收敛性和稳定性结果。

items.en: Results for SGD (Q) were poorer and less stable than Adam, and highly dependent on choice of learning rate.
items.zh: SGD（Q）的结果比 Adam 更差且更不稳定，并且高度依赖于学习率的选择。

items.en: On a popular machine translation task, we have demonstrated similar quality results to Adam, using a sublinear amount of extra space for accumulators. This should enable training of significantly larger models on the same memory-constrained hardware. We have also introduced update clipping, a potentially more-generally-useful technique for stabilizing adaptive gradient methods.
items.zh: 在一个流行的机器翻译任务上，我们展示了与 Adam 相似的质量结果，同时为累加器使用了次线性的额外空间。这应该能够在相同内存受限的硬件上训练更大的模型。我们还引入了更新裁剪，这是一种可能更通用的稳定自适应梯度方法的技术。

items.en: Code for running Adafactor is available in the open-source Tensor2Tensor library.
items.zh: 运行 Adafactor 的代码可在开源 Tensor2Tensor 库中获得。

items.en: Thanks to Łukasz Kaiser, the Tensor2Tensor team and the open-source community for helping test and debug Adafactor. Also thanks to Geoffrey Hinton, who asserted that training works well if the magnitudes of parameter updates are about 10−2superscript10210^{-2} to 10−3superscript10310^{-3} times the magnitude of the parameters.
items.zh: 感谢 Łukasz Kaiser、Tensor2Tensor 团队和开源社区帮助测试和调试 Adafactor。同时感谢 Geoffrey Hinton，他断言如果参数更新的幅度约为参数幅度的 10⁻² 到 10⁻³ 倍，训练效果会很好。
